title: ExecutionRecord
description: Envelope-composed durable execution evidence emitted by a leaf node after bounded work. The payload mirrors daimyo's ExecutionEvidence semantics using protocol snake_case and structured artifact/touch-report refs.
$comment: Required payload fields are task_id, node_id, summary, touch_report, and produced_artifact_refs. Optional payload fields mirror daimyo's report_ref and intended surface evidence. The shared envelope owns artifact_id, created_at, output_refs, confidence, diagnostics, and ownership.

task_id.description: REQUIRED string. Protocol snake_case representation of the Daimyo TaskId whose leaf produced this evidence.

node_id.description: REQUIRED string. Protocol snake_case representation of the Daimyo NodeId whose leaf produced this evidence.

summary.description: REQUIRED string. Human-readable but durable execution summary from daimyo's ExecutionEvidence.summary field. Consumers must use structured sibling fields for decisions.

touch_report.description: REQUIRED object. Concrete touched surfaces reported by the leaf, using the reusable DGOS-T-0015 TouchReport sub-schema.

produced_artifact_refs.description: REQUIRED array. Structured protocol replacement for daimyo's string artifacts field. Empty means the leaf produced no separate durable artifact refs beyond this record.

report_ref.description: OPTIONAL string. Daimyo-compatible external or store-local report reference associated with this evidence.

intended_files.description: OPTIONAL array. Protocol snake_case representation of daimyo's intendedFiles field for conservative conflict checks before actual writes.

intended_interfaces.description: OPTIONAL array. Protocol snake_case representation of daimyo's intendedInterfaces field.

intended_data.description: OPTIONAL array. Protocol snake_case representation of daimyo's intendedData field.

summary.description: REQUIRED string. Daimyo-compatible execution evidence summary.

touch_report.description: REQUIRED object. Concrete touched surfaces reported by the leaf.

produced_artifact_refs.description: REQUIRED array. Structured artifact refs corresponding to daimyo's ExecutionEvidence.artifacts values.

report_ref.description: OPTIONAL string. External or store-local report reference associated with this evidence.

intended_files.description: OPTIONAL array. Intended file surfaces from daimyo's ExecutionEvidence.intendedFiles.

intended_interfaces.description: OPTIONAL array. Intended interface surfaces from daimyo's ExecutionEvidence.intendedInterfaces.

intended_data.description: OPTIONAL array. Intended data surfaces from daimyo's ExecutionEvidence.intendedData.
